## X-Sense Home Security v1.3.13.13

### Alarm Sensors
- Maps APK alarm-topic `isAlarm` payloads into Home Assistant `alarmStatus` when X-Sense does not send `alarmStatus` directly.
- Routes direct child-device MQTT alarm updates through the normal APK state parser instead of writing those payloads raw.
- Removes the previous activation-field alarm mapping so `activate` and `isActivate` are no longer treated as smoke alarm status.

### Validation
- Adds regression coverage for active, inactive, and child-device APK alarm-topic payloads.
- Adds regression coverage for direct child-device MQTT alarm routing.
